name: Star Anise Vegetable Salad (Morocco) Bbc
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam chunks of carrot and courgette (zucchini) until tender.
2. Drain the vegetables and add a few star anise and a drizzle of white wine vinegar.
3. Allow to cool, then toss with olive oil, lemon juice, chopped fresh flat-leaf parsley, and cilantro.
4. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
5. Toss in the dressing until well combined.
6. Serve as is or garnish with unchopped parsley leaves.
